free_text: the focal plane of a quadrupole-dipole-dipole-dipole
206Pb target with a thickness of 179 mu-g/cm2.
Error bars, presented in figure, give
due to errors in separating poorly resolved levels,
background subtraction, and peak count statistics.
Absolute scale errors arose primarily from
uncertainties in the charge integration and target
thickness, and are estimated to be about +20%
No information on source of uncertainties
